SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_OptionGroup.S: Currently Supported Mods for Mod Settings Backup
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.PlaySo: Play a small audio sound on mods loading completed.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.AutoSa:
Show chirp message every minute to remind that autosave is off.
Requires <Custom Chirps> mod.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Disabl: Disable "Resume" button on the Paradox Launcher?
Disable showing the "Resume" button on the Paradox Launcher, so it's not clicked accidentally.
Disable "Continue Game" button on the Main Menu?
Disable showing the "Continue Game" button on the Main Menu, so it's not clicked accidentally.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Delete: Enable the automatic deletion of corrupted settings (game or mod).
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.AutoRe: Enable the automatic restoring of all game settings, supported mods settings and all keybinds from Profile 1 when the game starts.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.AutoCl: Enable the automatic cleanup of all game playsets when the game starts.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Enable: Enable detailed logging to catch issues (only to be used for debugging purpose).
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.SavePr: Save Profile Names after typing the entries.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Profil:
Select the profile to be used for the buttons below. Profile 1 will be auto restored on launch if the "Auto Restore Settings on Startup (Profile 1)?" is active.
The profile names can be changed from the "Profile Names" tab.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Create: Backup Game Settings, Mod Settings and Keybinds to the selected profile.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Restor: Restore Game Settings, Mod Settings and Keybinds from the selected profile.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Create: Backup Game Settings to the selected profile.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Restor: Restore Game Settings from the selected profile.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Create: Backup Mod Settings to the selected profile.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Restor: Restore Mod Settings from the selected profile.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Create: Backup Keybinds to the selected profile.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Restor: Restore Keybinds from the selected profile.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.ModLis: Sort the loaded mod list by the mod's name (Default). Local mods are excluded from sorting and will always be on top.
Sort the loaded mod list by size. Local mods are excluded from sorting and will always be on top.
Sort the loaded mod list by the author name. Local mods are excluded from sorting and will always be on top.

Toggle the list's sort direction from ascending to descending and vice versa.
Current state: {SimpleModCheckerPlus.Replacement.SortDetails}
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.ModFol: Select a mod package and to verify only that package.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Verify: Verify all mods downloaded from PDX Mods and currently stored on disk.{SimpleModCheckerPlus.VerifyMoreText}
Verify only the mod package selected above which are downloaded from PDX Mods and currently stored on disk.{SimpleModCheckerPlus.VerifyMoreText}
Verify all mods downloaded from PDX Mods and currently stored on disk, but without the large Region Packs.{SimpleModCheckerPlus.VerifyMoreText}
Verify all mods in active playset that is downloaded from PDX Mods and currently stored on disk.{SimpleModCheckerPlus.VerifyMoreText}
Check all mod's metadata that is downloaded from PDX Mods and currently stored on disk, to find if they are migrated to valid format.{SimpleModCheckerPlus.VerifyMoreText}
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.CleanU: Clean up all playsets where old versions of mods are still subscribed where a more latest version is available.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.ModDat: The time when the current mod database was published.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.StarQ_Option.Suppor: A list of currently supported mod for settings backup/restore.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.CocCleaner.Title: {SimpleModCheckerPlus.ShortName}: Found {FileCount} corrupted Settings file
SimpleModCheckerPlus.CocCleaner.Desc: Click here to delete and restart to prevent errors...
SimpleModCheckerPlus.Cleanup.Title: {SimpleModCheckerPlus.ShortName}: Playsets are out-of-sync and contains outdated mods
SimpleModCheckerPlus.Cleanup.Desc: Click here to restart for applying fix...
SimpleModCheckerPlus.MakeModBackup.Title: {SimpleModCheckerPlus.ShortName}: The mod has updated.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.MakeModBackup.Desc: Click here to recreate your Profile 1 (Mod) again...
SimpleModCheckerPlus.MakeGameBackup.Desc: Click here to recreate your Profile 1 (Game) again...
SimpleModCheckerPlus.Verify.End: Mod Verification completed. Click here for details
SimpleModCheckerPlus.Verify.Header.WillA: Mod Verification Result will appear here...
SimpleModCheckerPlus.Verify.Issue.MultiT: - Multiple versions of the same mod downloaded.
SimpleModCheckerPlus.Verify.Issue.CIDMis: - {RelativePath} does not match with the backup
SimpleModCheckerPlus.VerifyMoreText:
The process will take some time depending on the number and size of the mods.
- Please do not run this while in game/editor.
- Please do not launch game/editor while the verification is running.
